# Storage Node

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

This document defines semantic conventions for storage nodes.

## Storage Node Entity

A storage node is an individual controller or server within a storage system or cluster that
manages storage resources and handles I/O operations.

<!-- semconv entity.storage.node -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.node`

**Description:** A storage node is an individual controller or server within a storage system or cluster that manages storage resources and handles I/O operations.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.node.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the node in the cluster. | `1`; `2`; `node-0A1B2C3D` |
| Description | [`storage.node.cluster`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the cluster name to which the node belongs. | `gpfs-prod-cluster`; `scale-cluster-dc1`; `ess-cluster` |
| Description | [`storage.node.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The configured name of the node/controller of the storage system. | `node1.gpfs.example.com`; `ess-node-01`; `flashsystem-ctrl-a` |
| Description | [`storage.node.partner`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the partner node identifier for high availability configurations. | `node2`; `canister2`; `partner-node-02` |
| Description | [`storage.node.protocols`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string[] | Indicates the protocols supported by the node. | `["NFS", "SMB", "Object"]` |
| Description | [`storage.node.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the node. | `online`; `offline`; `degraded` |
| Description | [`storage.node.version`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Firmware version of the specific node. | `6.0.0.0 250903.110001` |
| Description | [`storage.node.ip_address`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 4 (IPv4) address of the node. [1] | `192.168.1.1`; `10.0.0.10` |
| Description | [`storage.node.ip_address_6`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 6 (IPv6) address of the node. [2] | `fe80::1`; `2001:db8::2` |

**[1] `storage.node.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[2] `storage.node.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.
